assistance_disclosure.author_accountability: The author verifies every claim, source, calculation and test.

decision: Should support operations keep the current weekly retention review or prioritize a defined at-risk segment for manual review?

decision_options.description: Keep the current weekly review without a new targeting rule.
Prioritize a predeclared at-risk segment for manual support review.

milestones.acceptance_gate: problem_selection contract passes with no blocking findings
data_contract contract passes with no blocking findings
baseline contract passes with no blocking findings
implementation contract passes with no blocking findings
verification contract passes with no blocking findings
peer_review contract passes with no blocking findings
defense contract passes with no blocking findings

population: eligible trial users with complete seven-day observation windows

risks.description: Reference event extract may be unavailable
risks.mitigation: Confirm synthetic fallback before data-contract work
risks.trigger: data_access gate fails or evidence is missing

risks.description: User-level fields may enter a public sample
risks.mitigation: Publish only aggregated or synthetic rows
risks.trigger: privacy gate fails or evidence is missing

risks.description: Descriptive evidence may be written as causal
risks.mitigation: Block causal wording in claim review
risks.trigger: methodology gate fails or evidence is missing

risks.description: Implementation may exceed a laptop budget
risks.mitigation: Keep a deterministic tiny profile and bounded sample
risks.trigger: compute gate fails or evidence is missing

risks.description: Consumer artifact may be stale or hard to rerun
risks.mitigation: Require freshness marker and one-command build
risks.trigger: delivery gate fails or evidence is missing

risks.description: Independent review may arrive after the defense date
risks.trigger: review gate fails or evidence is missing

in_scope: audit activation and support-load evidence for the eligible population
compare a no-action baseline with one predeclared manual-review policy
ship a reproducible decision package with independent verification
non_goals: claim a causal effect of support outreach
build an online production service or automated account action
stop_conditions: required source cannot be published or replaced with a synthetic equivalent
decision owner cannot choose between the declared actions
a blocking quality gate remains unresolved after the verification budget

success_criteria.acceptance_test: claim-evidence audit has zero unresolved links
success_criteria.description: Every recommendation is linked to a declared action and evidence item.

success_criteria.acceptance_test: clean-room command exits zero and manifest hashes match
success_criteria.description: A reviewer can rebuild the public package from allowed inputs.
